metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4522
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 5 C shows the synaptic region where a basket cell axon contacts the soma of a Purkinje cell. Some gold particles are seen in the presynaptic terminal of a climbing fiber.
Fig. 5 D shows synapses in the molecular layer. Many particles are seen in the presynaptic terminals. Particles are also seen in the postsynaptic terminal.
Fig. 6 A provides a quantitative analysis of the subcellular distribution of OGT with labelling of presynaptic and postsynaptic terminals.
Fig. 2 A shows an immunoblot of cerebellar lysate with anti-OGT antibody labelling a single band of 110 kDa.

12/02/2021 Dnyanada: The protein is also expressed in the postsynaptic cytosol (linked SynGO ID: 4524).. Experimental description: Cerebellum was extirpated from Wistar rats (male, 9-11 weeks...). /p. 195
